testCases.description: Two-member half-aggregation group, SIGHASH_DEFAULT
Two-member full-aggregation group, SIGHASH_ALL
Opted-out input alongside a two-member half-aggregation group
Witness element starts with the undefined marker byte 0xbe
Opted-out input encodes SIGHASH_DEFAULT explicitly as a 0x00 sighash byte
Half-aggregation markers without an input carrying the aggregate signature
testCases.failureReason: aggregation group has no final input

testCases.description: Half-aggregation marker appears after the group's final input
Aggregate signature is 128 bytes for a two-member half-aggregation group (expected 96)
Opt-out flavored signatures folded into a half-aggregation group by a third party
testCases.failureReason: aggregate signature invalid, messages commit to opt-out mode

testCases.description: Witness v2 input with an empty witness
Opt-out marker as a 1-byte witness element without a signature
Opt-out marker with an explicit sighash byte but without a signature
Half-aggregation group whose first member carries an annex that is committed in its signature message
Annex removed by a third party from the transaction of annex-committed-valid
testCases.failureReason: signature message committed to the annex

testCases.description: Witness v2 script path spend of a single CHECKSIG leaf under BIP 341/342 rules, alongside an opted-out key path input
Full-aggregation signature created over opt-out flavored messages, placed in a full-aggregation group
testCases.failureReason: aggregate signature invalid, messages commit to opt-out mode

testCases.description: Full-aggregation final input carries 96 bytes after the marker (97-byte 0xbd element, matches no defined witness structure)
testCases.failureReason: marker and length match no defined structure

testCases.description: Mixed transaction mirroring Example 4 of the BIP: two opted-out inputs, a half-aggregation group with a SIGHASH_SINGLE member, and a full-aggregation group, with interleaved input indices
Opted-out input uses SIGHASH_SINGLE at input index 1 of a single-output transaction
Two inputs each carrying a 64-byte half-aggregation final element
testCases.failureReason: more than one final input in a group

testCases.description: Two inputs each carrying a 64-byte full-aggregation final element
testCases.failureReason: more than one final input in a group

testCases.description: Full-aggregation markers without an input carrying the aggregate signature
testCases.failureReason: aggregation group has no final input

testCases.description: Full-aggregation marker appears after the group's final input
Half-aggregation group with a single member carrying a 64-byte aggregate
Full-aggregation group with a single member
Single witness element starting with the annex prefix 0x50
testCases.failureReason: undefined marker byte, a single element is never an annex

testCases.description: Half-aggregation group whose final input carries an annex that is committed in its signature message
Opted-out input with the undefined sighash value 0x04
33-byte 0xbc element, below the 65-byte minimum for a half-aggregation final
testCases.failureReason: marker and length match no defined structure

testCases.description: Witness v2 output with a 33-byte witness program spent with an arbitrary witness
Opted-out input whose witness program is not a valid x-only public key
testCases.failureReason: witness program is not a valid x-only public key

testCases.description: Half-aggregation group member whose witness program is not a valid x-only public key
testCases.failureReason: witness program is not a valid x-only public key

testCases.description: Witness v2 script path spend with unknown leaf version 0xc2, which succeeds unconditionally per BIP 341
Witness v2 script path spend whose leaf script is OP_SUCCESS187 (byte 0xbb), which succeeds unconditionally per BIP 342
Witness v1 key path input alongside a two-member witness v2 half-aggregation group, mirroring Example 3 of the BIP
Explicit SIGHASH_ALL byte removed from a group member by a third party
testCases.failureReason: signature message committed to the sighash type

testCases.description: Witness v2 input whose only witness element is empty
Half-aggregation group member uses SIGHASH_SINGLE at input index 1 of a single-output transaction
Keypath-looking element followed by a second element that is not an annex, making this a script path spend with an invalid control block
Witness v2 output spent like a Taproot output with a bare 64-byte signature and no marker
8-member half-aggregation group with a 289-byte final witness element, crossing the compact size boundary for witness elements
Script path spend whose first stack element is a 1-byte 0xbc marker lookalike, which has no marker meaning outside key path spends
Half-aggregation and full-aggregation groups whose two members each spend outputs with the same witness program (address reuse)
